# Horizons Sandhills

> Premium nature retreat on 126 private acres of longleaf pine savanna in the Carolina Sandhills, South Carolina. Private 18-acre lake, wood-fired sauna, six Forest Villas, and The House. 90 minutes from Charlotte, 2.5 hours from Raleigh-Durham.

## The Property

Horizons Sandhills is a private luxury retreat at 423 Woodmen Rd, Patrick, SC 29584. The property spans 126 fully fenced acres — no neighbors, no shared land, no noise. At the center is an 18-acre private lake: no motor boats, no strangers, open only to guests. A wood-fired sauna sits on the water's edge.

The land is longleaf pine savanna — one of North America's most biodiverse and historically significant ecosystems. The Carolina Sandhills were shaped by ancient ocean shorelines. The area has been home to the Catawba people, colonial settlers, and remains one of the least-developed landscapes in the Southeast.

## Accommodations

**The Forest Villa** — from $609/night
Six private lakefront cabins. Each villa is spaced so guests cannot see their neighbors. King bed, en-suite bathroom, private deck overlooking the lake, Weber grill, Marshall Bluetooth speaker, Brooklinen linens. Intentionally offline — no Wi-Fi by design. Sleeps 2. Pets welcome in 3 of 6 villas ($75 fee).

**The House** — from $1,200/night
Flagship lakeside property sleeping eight. Four bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, full kitchen, lakeside deck with firepit, Starlink Wi-Fi. For families and groups. Exclusive use of the main property building.

## What's Included (All Stays)

- Unlimited wood-fired sauna (open 6am–11pm, seats 6)
- 2 Kevlar canoes + 2 paddleboards on the dock
- Twelve miles of marked hiking trails through longleaf pine savanna
- Outdoor firepit with wood stacked
- Stargazing chairs (2 per deck)
- E-bikes with printed trail map
- Welcome pantry box: sourdough, eggs, local honey from within 6 miles
- Personal host concierge on property
- Private fishing lake (15+ species, no license required, catch-and-release)
- Peach orchard on property (seasonal, pick your own June–August)
- 20-hive apiary producing longleaf pine honey

## Location & Distances

- Cheraw, SC (nearest town): 18 min
- Camden, SC (historic district): 32 min
- Florence, SC (regional center): 45 min
- Columbia, SC (state capital): 1 hr
- Charlotte, NC: 1 hr 30 min
- Raleigh-Durham, NC: 2 hr 30 min

## Booking & Policies

- 2-night minimum stay
- Check-in: 3:00 PM / Check-out: 11:00 AM
- Cancellation: full refund 14+ days out; 50% refund 7–13 days; no refund inside 7 days
- Events: weddings up to 40 guests, retreats and full-property buyouts available

- Website: https://horizonssandhills.com
- Phone: +1 (803) 555-0180
- Book: https://horizonssandhills.com/#reserve
